name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser
shortDescription: Professional diode laser with 600 watt power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan and advanced cooling system. Ideal for high-traffic salons and those seeking top-tier technology.
description: The NyxQueen is a professional-grade, 600W diode laser that you can use around the clock – making it an excellent choice even for high-traffic salons. The 4-wavelength system allows you to work effectively on every skin and hair type, while the advanced cooling system ensures a discomfort-free treatment for your clients.
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser with 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm). 50 million shots, advanced cooling, premium build. 2-year warranty, free training.

videoDescription.headline: NyxQueen diode laser – The queen of hair removal
paragraphs: The NyxQueen is perhaps the highest quality, most versatile and most durable diode laser hair removal device available on the market today. In terms of both effectiveness and treatment comfort, it is the cream of the crop, and can be used around the clock, making it an excellent choice even for high-traffic salons.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the NyxQueen? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see the NyxQueen in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out in person!

final.headline: Interested in the NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why do beauticians choose the NyxQueen?
featureRows.subtitle: Efficiency, durability and comfort at the highest level.

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for all skin types and hair colors
features.description:
The multi-wavelength system allows the device to be effectively used on different skin types and hair-colored areas – offering a safe solution for every client.

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, gold standard
940 nm – darker skin tones
1064 nm – deep-seated hair follicles
features.highlight: With the combined application of wavelengths, visible results can be achieved even after the first treatment.

features.title: 600W power – faster treatments, more clients
features.description: The 600W NyxQueen diode laser quickly covers larger areas (such as legs, back), significantly reducing treatment time and increasing salon efficiency.
features.highlight: A full leg hair removal can be completed in just 15-20 minutes.

features.title: 50 million shot lifespan
features.description: The NyxQueen's diode module is guaranteed for at least 50 million shots, which means years of lifespan even with regular use. This means you don't have to worry about replacement part costs – the device works reliably in the long term.
features.highlight: 50 million shots – with 10-15 clients per day – can mean many years of lifespan.

features.title: Advanced cooling system – painless treatment
features.description: The NyxQueen's multi-phase cooling system (water + air + TEC) cools the handpiece down to -5°C, making the treatment pleasant and painless for clients. This is especially important when treating sensitive areas (bikini, underarms, face).

features.title: Adjustable spot size PRO configuration
features.description:
The adjustable spot size allows the operator to adapt the light pulse size to different body areas, making the treatment faster, more precise and safer.

Adaptable to body areas:

Large spot size for fast treatment of legs, back or chest, smaller spot size for precise work on face, underarms and bikini area.

Optimal penetration:

The larger spot size reaches deeper hair follicles, while the smaller head is ideal for superficial, fine hair.

Faster treatments:

Larger areas can be treated in less time, increasing the daily client count.

Greater comfort and safety:

The energy density can be precisely controlled, allowing fine-tuning of power for every skin type and body part.

features.title: Treatment areas – a universal solution for every client
features.description:
The NyxQueen diode laser offers a universal solution for permanent hair removal, regardless of skin and hair type. The technology operates on multiple wavelengths, effectively treating lighter and darker skin tones as well as finer and stronger hair.

Treatable areas:

Legs, arms, back, chest
Underarms, intimate area
Face, chin, lip, mustache
Male clients (dense, strong hair)

Treatments show visible results after the very first session: hair becomes thinner, growth slows, and skin becomes smoother and more even.
features.highlight: The 600W power effectively treats even dense, strong male hair on larger body surfaces.

features.title: Business advantage – faster ROI, higher revenue
features.description:
The NyxQueen's fast, efficient and reliable operation enables shorter setup time, serving more clients, and thus higher revenue for the salon.

NyxQueen advantages for salon owners:

Shorter treatment time = more clients per day
Stable performance even during intensive salon use
Low operating costs (50M shots, no frequent module replacement)
Client-friendly treatment = satisfied, returning clients

As with all laser technologies, using the device requires responsibility: proper preparation, operator expertise, and aftercare are necessary for safe and satisfactory results.
features.highlight: With high power, combined wavelengths and advanced cooling, the NyxQueen is an ideal choice for salons offering permanent hair removal services.

training.headline: Device operator training – within official adult education
training.intro: Professional device operator training is available for the NyxQueen diode laser, provided within an officially registered adult education program. The training aims to provide participants with comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional and safe use of the device.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Setting NyxQueen treatment parameters by skin and hair type
Practical treatments on models – on different body areas
Contraindications, client selection and pre-treatment protocols
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn treatment techniques in a real-world setting.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official FAR certificate confirming competence for the professional operation of the device.

testimonials.name: Tóth Brigitta
testimonials.text: I'm very satisfied with the NyxQueen! <mark>My clients immediately feel the difference compared to my previous device</mark> – the treatment is faster, the cooling is fantastic, and the results are visible after the very first session. The training was great too, everything was explained.

testimonials.name: GlamGlow (Romania)
testimonials.text: <mark>Amazing device and amazing training</mark> thank you very much for this day!

testimonials.name: Szabó Kitti Lash Stylist
testimonials.text: I ordered this diode in rosegold and I'm glad I did! Although I had to match all the other metal colors in the salon, it was totally worth it because the salon looks beautiful now and <mark>the NyxQueen looks amazing while delivering much faster results compared to my previously rented device!</mark>

testimonials.name: Szasza (Budapest)
testimonials.text: I've been using this device for 2 months, I ordered it when it was first released, so I was very excited about what a brand new device would be like. I used to do IPL, which is a very different technique but <mark>I can already see the difference and diode laser has become a great love for me and my clients too!</mark> Highly recommend 5*

testimonials.name: Nagy Annamária
testimonials.text: Thank you very much for the device and <mark>the training, which we both found very useful</mark> with my daughter. We've been operating the device without any issues since then and have only had positive experiences, as have our clients.

testimonials.name: Ninett - Glow Up Beauty
testimonials.text: I ordered this device in rosegold and it's so beautiful I really wanted to share it here! <mark>We're all satisfied with the quality too</mark> we made a great decision when we chose this one and we've already used up the gift gel!

expertQuote.quote: Diode laser hair removal is one of the most sought-after cosmetic services. With its 600W power and 50 million shot lifespan, the NyxQueen offers one of the best value-for-money investments for a salon.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What skin types can the NyxQueen be used on?
faq.answer: The NyxQueen operates on 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), making it safely and effectively applicable on all Fitzpatrick skin types (I-VI). Thanks to the combined wavelengths, it delivers excellent results on both light and dark skin tones.

faq.question: How quickly does the NyxQueen pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 5-8 clients per day. A diode laser hair removal treatment costs between 15,000-50,000 Ft depending on the treated area. Use our ROI calculator on the page for exact calculations!

faq.question: What does the 50 million shot lifespan mean?
faq.answer: The diode module is guaranteed for 50 million pulses – with 10-15 clients per day, this can mean 8-10 years of lifespan. This is a manufacturer guarantee; in practice the module may produce even more shots.

faq.question: What training comes with the NyxQueen?
faq.answer: The device comes with a 79,990 Ft value device operator training within official adult education, FREE of charge. The training concludes with an FAR certificate confirming competence for the professional operation of the device.

faq.question: What is the PRO configuration with adjustable spot size?
faq.answer: The PRO configuration (+259,990 Ft) includes a special handpiece that allows you to adjust the light pulse size for different body areas. Large spot size for fast treatment of legs and back, smaller spot size for precise work on face and bikini area.

faq.question: What warranty do I get on the device?
faq.answer: We provide a 2-year comprehensive warranty on the NyxQueen. We have our own service background, and we provide a replacement device during repairs so your salon operations don't have to stop.

faq.question: Is it possible to see the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the NyxQueen in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
